scope_caveat: This project estimates the CO₂ footprint of OpenRouter-visible LLM inference — a representative but partial slice of global AI usage. It is NOT a measurement of total global data-center emissions. All figures are estimates with uncertainty ranges, not measurements.

esrs_e1.disclosure: E1-6 Gross Scopes 1, 2, 3 and Total GHG emissions
esrs_e1.line_item: Scope 2 purchased energy (location-based vs market-based) — estimated from OpenRouter-visible LLM inference traffic (proxy for Scope 3 Category 1 purchased services)
esrs_e1.note: Ranges carried end-to-end from totals; no collapse to point values. Dual reporting follows GHG Protocol Scope 2. Scale by modeled_traffic_fraction for full inventory. Full uncertainty and partial-coverage statement is in scope_caveat (non-removable).
